prompt: This is a combined knowledge-to-build task in `{path}`. First use search_notes to find the planner-router policy for easy tasks, multi-line medium tasks, and combined tasks. Then use repo_map and read_file with the workspace-relative paths shown by repo_map, update the function logic, and run test_runner on `{path}`. Use ast_edit for the multi-line function body rewrite. Finish only when tests pass cleanly.
